'''Fisk''' was a member of the [[Huxlings]], working for [[Jerf Huxley]] as<ref name="Survivor's Quest" /> of [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' to [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].</ref> As a young boy, he met [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
